name: Junky Milk
description:
Junky Milk : 3 ans d’élaboration. Sur 280 plantes , il n’en resta qu’une ! (CLONE ELITE)

 

Cette variété a soigneusement été développée par notre équipe de growers durant 3ans.

Afin d’arriver à ce résultat, nous avons procédé à une sélection sur 280 pieds mères qui avaient déjà été sélectionnés au préalable sur 1200 plantes. Après un affinage de notre sélection nous avons alors réussi à isoler une dizaine de plantes à fort potentiel. Ces plants ont alors été envoyés en floraison, dans notre installation intérieure sous lampes LED (Big up @Floraflex). Après la récolte, nous avons envoyé les produits en analyses dans un laboratoire partenaire (AMBRA). La plante ayant obtenu le meilleur résultat a été conservé en pied mère.

Le meilleur phénotype de notre Junky Milk nous a donc sorti des résultats extraordinaires : un mélange CBD – CBG incroyable. Le résultat de plusieurs années de recherche enfin récompensé. C’est avec une grande joie (et une certaine fierté) que nous vous la dévoilons enfin. Ses caractéristiques sont uniques, tant par ses taux CBD – CBG que par son aspect. Recouverte de trichomes, elle possède un ratio résine/humidité bien maîtrisé ! Et nous attendons vos avis avec impatience.

Son côté indica lui permet d’avoir une floraison rapide, entre 65 et 68 jours. Nous avons choisi de la cultiver en Greenhouse afin que ces fleurs poussent et grandissent dans des conditions stables et que l’aspect de la fleur soit préservé au maximum. Elle a alors bénéficié des meilleurs engrais du marché qui soit :

 

Junky Milk powered by Advanced nutrients

  • Sensi Bloom a et B : C’est une sorte de booster pour floraison, qui vous permettra d’apporter les nutriments nécessaires pour que vos plantes fleurissent correctement, tout en les rendant fortes et saines.
  • BIG Bud : Il aide la plante à former des fleurs toujours plus grandes avec des bourgeons riches en pistils ;
  • Bud Candy : Le rôle de cet engrais est d’aider le plant à faire des fleurs plus denses et pesantes, en plus de stimuler la production de résine de ces dernières ;
  • Sensizym : Ca serait comme une sorte de “pansement”, qui aiderait la plante à régénérer ses racines abîmées et fatiguées ;
  • B-52 : Ce sont des vitamines de type B, qui permettent aux nutriments d’atteindre les endroits nécessaires à la plante pour bien pousser, qui aident également à la réalisation de la photosynthèse;
  • Overdrive : C’est un engrais qu’on utilise après le Big Bud, dans le but de toujours faire grossir les fleurs le plus possible.

Ces engrais proviennent d’Advanced Nutrients, qui est une marque réputée pour ces produits de qualité. Cultivée sous LED, elle a également bénéficié un curing de 3 mois avec conservation au frais, ce qui nous donne une variété au profil terpénique riche et développé !

 

Une variété de cannabis CBD-CBG onctueuse

Rien qu’en lisant son nom, vous aurez compris que la Junky Milk possède des saveurs douces et onctueuses, bien évidemment ! Vous y retrouver aussi de légers arômes d’orange et de mangue, qui donne une certaine douceur à la fleur, mais aussi une saveur supplémentaire détectable par les connaisseurs et un peu particulière puisqu’il s’agit du coté diesel. En effet, la Junky Milk dégage des arômes d’essence qui sont prêt a prendre feu à chaque bouffé, que l’on peut également retrouver chez d’autres variétés comme la New York Diesel par exemple.

Cette particularité fait tout le charme de cette variété, et il arrive souvent que les consommateurs soient à la recherche de cet arôme justement.

Le goût est important, mais l’aspect aussi ! Cette belle plante a été préservée de toute agression extérieure. Elle revêt de ce fait de superbes pistils orangés, avec différentes nuances. Avec ses têtes charnues et résineuses, découvrez cette variété douce remplie de trichomes !

 

Une indica relaxante

La Junky Milk est une variété à dominance indica, ce qui veut dire qu’elle procure plutôt des effets relaxants et apaisants dans l’ensemble, qui donne envie de se glisser sous la couette ou sur le canapé et de ne plus en bouger. Cependant, la variété que l’équipe Kilogrammes vous propose possède un taux de THC ne dépassant pas les 0.3%, ce qui veut dire que vous n’aurez pas le “high” qu’elle procure habituellement, mais cela ne veut pas dire qu’elle ne vous fera aucun effet !

En effet, la Junky Milk CBD-CBG possède, comme son nom l’indique, du cannabidiol, qui aurait des effets bénéfiques sur le corps mais aussi du cannabigérol. Ce dernier agirait sur le système dopaminergique et pourrait provoquer une sensation de décontraction, autant physique avec une relaxation musculaire, que mentale. Cela peut être pratique si vous êtes soumis à un épisode anxieux, mais aussi si vous souffrez de douleurs chroniques.

Bien sûr, chaque personne est différente, et les effets pourraient varier en fonction de chacun.e. Cependant, le CBD n’est pas un médicament et n’a pas vocation à être un traitement ! Si vous souhaitez en consommer, n’hésitez pas à vous tourner vers votre médecin, surtout si vous êtes déjà sous traitement.

 

Comment consommer la Junky Milk CBD-CBG ?

Ces fleurs CBD peuvent être consommées de diverses façons, que vous pouvez adapter en fonction de vos envies, vos habitudes de consommation et de vos besoins.

Pour des effets rapides, vous pouvez consommer nos fleurs CBD par inhalation ou par combustion, en les ajoutant dans des feuilles de chanvre. En revanche, ce type de consommation est la moins préconisé, car la fumée n’est pas recommandée pour le système respiratoire. Bien entendu, certains consommateurs vont préférer cette technique, mais nous vous conseillons vraiment de tester les autres manières de consommer la Junky Milk CBD, dans le but de préserver vos poumons.

Vous pouvez opter pour l’option “ingestion”, soit en grindant vos fleurs et en les décarboxylant par la suite pour les intégrer à vos plats. Soit en fabriquant du beurre CBD ou de l’huile CBD pour l’ajouter ensuite dans vos recettes.

Et pour finir, vous pouvez choisir d’infuser vos fleurs de chanvre CBD dans une boisson chaude, que ce soit du café, du thé, une tisane ou bien un chocolat chaud. Pensez à les décarboxyler, car la chaleur de la boisson ne permet pas au CBD d’offrir tout son potentiel, et accompagnez votre boisson d’une matière grasse pour un effet optimal du CBD.

À vous de voir la méthode qui s’adaptera le mieux à ce que vous recherchez 🙂

ATTENTION ! JUNKY MILK CBD X CBG EST EN ÉDITION SUPER LIMITÉE !

 

LES GARANTIES KILOGRAMMES®

  • Des fleurs CBD rigoureusement sélectionnées
  • Un taux de THC inférieur à 0,3 % (conformément à la législation en vigueur)
  • Pour des achats en gros, rendez-vous sur la section grossiste CBD

name: CBD Capsules 20mg
description:
Discover a whole new way to enjoy the benefits of CBD with CBD Capsules!

What are CBD Capsules?

CBD can be found in many different forms, including CBD flowers, e-liquids, distillates, resins and oils. But it’s not always easy to take a precise dose of cannabidiol when it comes in these formats. Nanogram has come up with a brand-new product: CBD Softgels!

These little capsules are made from high-quality cannabidiol, derived from hemp grown and harvested in an environmentally-friendly way, guaranteed free from pesticides and other pollutants harmful to health. CBD is therefore contained in these vegetarian capsules, which are perfectly suited to vegetarian/vegan diets, as well as to people suffering from lactose intolerance.

 

CBD and turmeric, a perfect alliance

CBD is renowned for its relaxing and de-stressing effects. Regularly used in cooking, turmeric is originally a rhizomatous (root-like) plant. Turmeric has many virtues: a recognized anti-inflammatory, it is also an excellent gastrointestinal protector, soothing digestive disorders such as nausea, heartburn and bloating. In some cases, it can also be useful for treating skin problems such as psoriasis or eczema.

In short, turmeric is a veritable nugget of goodness, underlined by the CBD present in its capsules. In short, CBD and turmeric are a great team!

 

Why use CBD Softgels?

In addition to the promising virtues of softgels, they’re easy to use. You can easily carry CBD Softgels with you wherever you go, and consume them whenever you like. These little marvels contain 20 mg of CBD, as well as turmeric, giving them a lovely golden-yellow hue. Thanks to their very precise caliber, it will be easier to control your CBD intake, as you’ll know exactly what dose you’re ingesting. So there’s no risk of overdosing, which could make you want to sleep… even at work!

Small, discreet capsules that can follow you everywhere without a care in the world. By consuming cannabidiol in capsule form, you’ll avoid prying eyes, so you can have your CBD intake in complete peace of mind. In addition to cannabidiol, these CBD capsules contain a small amount of hemp seed oil, giving the CBD greater bioavailability.

 

20mg of CBD in a single product!

They’re discreet to take, as CBD capsules look just like any other dietary supplement capsule, allowing you to enjoy your CBD without anyone noticing. What’s more, they’re guaranteed to be tasteless and odorless, which will appeal to anyone who may be bothered by the distinctive aroma of hemp. This product is totally legal, as it doesn’t even contain THC.

The flexible capsule box contains a total of 60 capsules, or 1,200 mg of cannabidiol per box. As for their price, it’s certainly the best value you’ll find on the market, without neglecting the CBD quality, which remains top-of-the-range.

Being in edible form, you’ll be able to enjoy the soothing, relaxing effects of CBD, which will last longer than if you took it in any other way.

 

How do I take CBD Softgels?

Taking CBD Softgels couldn’t be easier! All you need is a glass of water and your capsule, and then swallow. You can take 1 to 3 tablets a day, that’s 1 tablet every 8 hours. To preserve the active ingredients of CBD in optimal condition, we recommend that you keep your box of capsules refrigerated, or in a cool, dry place away from light.

Although these CBD capsules do not contain any psychoactive ingredients, we still recommend that you consult your doctor before taking them. Indeed, if you’re elderly and/or undergoing medical treatment, it’s always important to see your doctor before taking any CBD.

Calculate the right dose of CBD for you, quickly and easily, with Nanogram’s CBD Softgels!

 

CBD oil and softgels, what’s the difference?

You might think that CBD oil and CBD softgels are the same product, but they’re actually two very different CBD products. In fact, although they are both consumed orally, the comparison stops there.

CBD oil is taken sublingually, allowing the CBD to take effect fairly quickly, dissipating rapidly into the bloodstream. This allows for rapid effects, which comes in handy in the event of an anxiety attack, for example. This type of oil has a fairly pronounced herbal taste, which could be off-putting to novices.

CBD soft gels, on the other hand, are tasteless, allowing consumption without too much apprehension. What’s more, CBD cannabis capsules need to be dissolved by gastric juices before they can offer their effects, which generally takes a few hours. The advantage of this type of consumption is that the CBD effects are felt over a longer period. And finally, unlike CBD oil, CBD capsules are designed to be taken as a cure.

 

CBD capsules: our consumers’ opinions

This type of product is well suited to people wishing to take a CBD cure, whether to relieve aches and pains, or simply to soothe themselves during a stressful period, as might be the case during exams, for example.

On the other hand, CBD softgels are not medicine. They cannot replace medical treatment, but can potentially be taken alongside it. Ask your doctor about taking CBD softgels in addition to your current treatment.

 

Nanogram® guarantees

  • A high-quality product
  • Zero THC content
  • For wholesale purchases, go to the CBD wholesale section

name: 10% CBD oil
description:
Enjoy a new type of product straight from Nanogram: 10% CBD oils

 

What is 10% CBD oil?

Kilogrammes is constantly seeking to satisfy the desires of its consumers and to renew itself in terms of CBD products in order to offer you even more choice. On our online CBD shop, you’ll find a range of Kilogrammes CBD products, including magnificent CBD flowers with their unique aromas, as well as CBD resins and CBD pollens from our cultivated CBD cannabis plants. Today, Nanogram’ s CBD oils are in the spotlight, with their 10% cannabidiol concentration.

This CBD-rich oil is extracted with CO². Produced from CBD flower seeds, Nanogram offers you a top-quality product. The 10% CBD oil comes in two different formats:

  • A 10-mL format, which is a fairly discreet size that you can easily carry with you wherever you go. This format is ideal for occasional consumers, or for short trips.
  • A 30-mL format, which is a little more substantial than the previous one. This format is perfect for anyone who enjoys a more regular consumption. It can also be a great way to treat your friends at a party.

This CBD oil contains 10% cannabidiol, which is a CBD level considered moderate. As such, it is suitable for novices as well as for those seeking mild effects.

 

Neutral aromas for everywhere use

10% CBD oil is extracted from the seeds of CBD hemp flowers. As a result, CBD oil contains very low levels of terpenes and other cannabinoids, which means that this product contains very little THC – less than 0.1%– making it completely legal for consumption. The final product has a faint cannabis odour and taste, which can be very practical, as it can be incorporated into a variety of products without its aromatic signature altering the final product.

So you can add it to your favorite dishes, cosmetics and even directly under your tongue!

 

How to use 10% CBD oils?

Using 10% CBD oil is simple enough on its own, but if it’s your very first time dealing with a product like this, it may seem natural to wonder how to consume 10% cbd oil. Well, there are a multitude of ways to consume your hemp CBD oil:

  • Under the tongue: Simply take a few drops of 10% CBD oil from the bottle, using the integrated pipette, and place small drops under your tongue. The 10% CBD oil needs to act quickly, as this allows the CBD to pass directly into the bloodstream.
  • In your everyday dishes: 10% CBD oil can also invite itself to your table. In fact, it blends perfectly with any recipe you choose.
  • In your cosmetics: as 10% CBD oil is a fatty substance, and therefore nourishing, it can be incorporated into your day and/or night care products. All you need to do is extract a few drops from the bottle, and add a few drops to your skincare cream.

Warning! We strongly advise against adding 10% CBD oil to your e-cigarette, as this product is not designed to be mixed with e-liquids. Indeed, 10% CBD oil cannot evaporate, and may clog your vaporizer.

What’s more, if you’re elderly and/or taking medication, we advise you to ask your doctor for advice on whether taking 10% CBD oil is compatible with your state of health.

 

The relaxing effects of 10% CBD oils

10% CBD oil is a product to be reserved for moments of relaxation, and can help you unwind in any circumstance. Whether it’s the eve of an exam or a professional meeting, 10% CBD oil will be your best ally in helping you relax, and get through the ordeal as serenely as possible.

Apply a few drops under your tongue, and you can say goodbye to sleepless nights! It may also be useful for chronic or temporary joint pain. Add it to your moisturizer, and it could help you gently relax every muscle in your body.

Add a CBD infusion to your 10% CBD oil skincare products, and you’ve got a great chill and cocooning moment.

Nanogram® guarantees

  • Superior quality oil
  • Zero THC
  • Organic & vegan products

name: CBD oil for pets
description:
CBD oil for animals by Nanogram

CBD oil for animals is a product totally adapted to the needs of your cat and/or dog. This CBD oil is non-toxic, guaranteed to have no psychotropic effects, as it contains no THC, and is said to have analgesic and relaxing properties. What’s more, the chicken flavour camouflages the herbaceous taste of cannabidiol oil, which is not always appreciated by our companions.

This type of dietary supplement is becoming increasingly recommended by vets, as they are less invasive than conventional treatments. However, we recommend that you consult your veterinarian before giving your pet CBD, as this oil is not a substitute for a prescription.

 

Dosage of CBD oil for animals

Our pets deserve the best, both in terms of nutrition and well-being. Their health is of paramount concern, and we are responsible for it. That’s why, before using CBD oil for pets, our teams advise you to consult your vet, and to follow the dosage instructions carefully.

Depending on your pet’s age, state of health or psychological state, the dose will not be the same. The doses given below are therefore only indicative, and do not constitute a prescription.

 

Directions for use

After mixing your bottle, give your pet 1 to 3 drops twice a day and observe his reactions to determine the optimal dose for him. Store your CBD oil at room temperature, in a dry place and away from light.

 

What is CBD oil?

CBD (cannabidiol) is a member of the cannabinoid family, like THC, which is present in cannabis. But unlike THC, CBD has no psychoactive properties, so is not harmful to your pet’s health. This CBD oil for pets is made from hemp seed oil to which CBD, from the Cannabis Sativa L plant known for its many benefits, has been added, along with chicken flavouring, to give this CBD oil for pets an even more appetising taste.

It contains all the cannabinoids found in cannabis, except THC, so you can be sure of a product with no psychotropic effects. Give your pet the best with Nanogram’s CBD oil for pets.

Animals and CBD

Homeostasis is our body’s internal balance, which affects a multitude of vital functions, such as the regulation of blood, breathing, heart rate, digestion, etc. By regulating these organic functions, it therefore influences sleep, mood, appetite, craving, and so on.

All mammals have an endocannabinoid system, including humans, dogs and cats. It’s a ‘ pro-homeostatic ‘ system, meaning that it acts to maintain the body’s equilibrium (homeostasis). CBD acts on CB1 and CB2 receptors, which are linked to the endocannabinoid system, enabling users to experience real relaxation and a state of calm.

CBD has many benefits, including the fact that it can help reduce your pet’s pain, even chronic pain. It also acts on mood, helping to reduce stress and anxiety, which can be linked to an absence or change of environment, for example.

The benefits of CBD for animals

If your pet is suffering from motion sickness, or if it’s difficult for him to bear your absence for even a few hours, and this is causing him a great deal of stress, thenCBD oil for animals could be the solution. The CBD contained in the oil may help your pet to relax, giving him a pleasant feeling of well-being.

CBD could also serve as an analgesic, having an anti-inflammatory action, it would lower your cat or dog’s pain threshold. Whether it’s occasional or chronic pain, this deliciously chicken-flavoured CBD pet oil could help your companion live with much less intrusive pain, also reducing the stress that such pain can cause.

CBD oil for animals is an excellent dietary supplement for your pet, which can be beneficial in the treatment of certain pathologies, such as arthritis, epilepsy, … but not only!

In fact, CBD also acts on your pet’s digestion and appetite, as it is said to have the ability to stimulate the latter via its influence on serotonin receptors. So, as 5-HT receptors play an important role in appetite and digestion, CBD could help increase appetite by reducing symptoms of stomach upset, rather than directly affecting the sensation of hunger. What’s more, by reducing your furry companion’s stress levels, he could regain a more consistent appetite.

 

NANOGRAM® GUARANTEES

  • Zero THC content to protect your pets’ health
  • A flavour particularly appreciated by dogs and cats

description:
An incredible smell of weed when you open the pouch and taste it: fill up on terpenes with Super Sour Diesel CBD!

 

Super Sour Diesel: discover its origins

In the THC version, its parents are two sativa-dominant hybrid strains: Super Silver Haze and Sour Diesel. Both have been popular with consumers for many years, Sour Diesel in particular is a mythical variety. A plant with mysterious origins, its distinctive flavours have given it a cult following and are perfectly reflected in the Super Sour Diesel CBD we offer, to the delight of its fans.

Super Sour Diesel CBD is a pretty plant with green buds dotted with numerous orange & yellow filaments characteristic of the descendants of the Sour Diesel line.

Like all stars, it’s demanding. Grown outdoors, it requires a warm climate such as the Côte d’Azur (no less!). This Super Sour Diesel CBD has been grown indoors to ensure the best possible quality. Correctly grown, it will take up space, both in height and surface area. It also likes to be noticed: its strong smell carries far, far away. Watch out for the neighbours!

 

A CBD superflower with style

Its unique fragrance is characteristic of the Sour Diesel line. As the name suggests, it’s a pungent, distinctive smell, reminiscent of fuel. It may sound negative, but this smell is very popular among CBD cannabis consumers! That’s because it heralds its distinctive taste.

In the mouth: a hint of bitterness, a fuel effect, not forgetting its skunk flavours, which come from its two parents. Super Sour Diesel CBD really does offer original sensations you won’t find anywhere else!

Make the engine roar, the feverish aromas and deep flavours of Super Sour Diesel CBD only announce the power of its terpenes!

 

Big-bore power

Super Sour Diesel CBD gets off to a flying start, and its effects are quickly felt.

In its THC version, SSD has soothing but not overpowering effects. Its 85% sativa origins ensure clearer thinking and energy. Appreciated for combating anxiety and depression, it can also boost creativity, and is particularly popular with artists, whose users claim it has a pain-relieving effect. The effects are not so different in the CBD version: relaxation and clear thinking are the order of the day, as this plant contains very little THC. So you won’t feel any unpleasant psychoactive effects 🙂

Super Sour Diesel CBD never ceases to surprise!

A LUNAR EXPERIENCE!

STORAGE INSTRUCTIONS

Our Re-Stash Box, for example, is the perfect solution if you don’t want to miss out on any of the unique qualities of Moonrock CBD.

IN CONCLUSION

Moonrock CBD is a real achievement, combining power and flavour for a unique experience. At Kilogrammes, we’re proud to offer you this exceptional product, the fruit of our expertise and passion for CBD. So, if you’re looking for an extraordinary experience, don’t hesitate any longer and give Moonrock CBD a try. You won’t be disappointed. Ready to reach for the stars with Kilograms?

description:

name: Fruitcake Popcorn
description:
Sweetness incarnate

This Fruitcake Popcorn CBD is inspired by the Fruitcake variety. It is what is known as a hybrid plant, as its genetics come from a cross with several other varieties. Its origins lie in a cross between Cherry Pie and Sherbet Dreams. Thanks to its complex genetics, Fruitcake offers flowers rich in taste and flavour, which will delight both seasoned consumers and novices.

But it has also been mixed with other varieties since then, such as Animal Cookie and Fruit Pebbles OG.

And the Kilogrammes team is proud to present its version of this variety: Fruitcake Popcorn CBD, a plant rich in cannabidiol, with a THC content of less than 0.3%!

Small flowers, but a great vintage!

Predominantly indica, Fruitcake Popcorn CBD is small to medium-sized, but very compact. It produces a rather large yield, with small, hard buds in shades of green and light brown, adorned with tiny, barely visible orange pistils. In fact, it’s because of the size of its buds that we’ve named this variety ‘popcorn’.

But these little CBD flowers are bound to surprise you! You’d think that because the flowers are relatively smaller than most other strains, they’d be softer, or even completely insignificant… But think again! These little buds are packed with trichomes, which contain high-quality terpenes and cannabinoids!

Grown in greenhouses, they benefit from natural sunlight and rich soil, while avoiding parasites and other natural variations that could slow down the growth of Fruitcake Popcorn CBD.

 

Citrus fruits for a good mood

Fruitcake Popcorn CBD is much appreciated for its fruity, sweet flavours, often reminiscent of a well-known variety, our CBD Gelato. There are also a few notes of citrus fruit to make it all the better!

In terms of taste, Fruitcake Popcorn CBD offers very fruity flavours, combined with a pleasant sweetness. A subtle blend of acidity, fruit and sugar – that’s how we might describe the flavours of Fruitcake Popcorn CBD.

 

Less agitation with CBD Fruitcake Popcorn

Fruitcake Popcorn CBD is said to have soothing and relaxing properties, which could help you to reduce certain sensations of chronic pain and inflammation.

With its hybrid profile, this CBD strain has both a boosting and a soothing effect. It’s a strain that helps put your mind at rest and relaxes your body, without tiring you out. It’s ideal at the end of the day, to help you forget a few worries, or at lunchtime, to start the second half of the day.

Of course, the effects of CBD are unique to each individual and may vary from one person to another. However, CBD products are not medicines and in no way replace medical treatment. Ask your doctor for advice if you need it.

 

How to consume Fruitcake Popcorn CBD?

You have several choices when it comes to consuming CBD flowers, whether by inhalation or ingestion. If you opt for the first method, we advise you to use a vaporiser, to get the most out of our Fruitcake Popcorn CBD without altering the product.

But you can also choose the ingestion method to enjoy these delicious CBD flowers. You can use them as ingredients in your recipes, creating CBD butter, CBD oil or simply sprinkling a few decarboxylated flowers on your plate.

Finally, you can make delicious CBD infusions by immersing your flowers in a hot liquid, always accompanied by whole milk or fat. This will allow the CBD to reach its full potential, so you can enjoy all its benefits.

You can also decide to alternate methods of consumption, depending on your mood and needs. It’s up to you to decide which method suits you best!

 

KILOGRAMMES® GUARANTEES

  • Rigorously selected CBD flowers
  • THC levels below 0.3% (in accordance with current legislation)
  • For bulk purchases, go to the CBD wholesaler section

name: Fruitcake Popcorn
description:

Cette Fruitcake Popcorn CBD est inspirée de la variété Fruitcake. Elle est ce que l’on appelle une plante hybride, car sa génétique provient d’un croisement avec plusieurs autres variétés. Ainsi, elle puise ses origines d’un croisement entre la Cherry Pie ainsi que la Sherbet Dreams. Grâce à sa génétique complexe, la Fruitcake offre des fleurs riches en goût et en saveur, qui ravira les consommateurs aguerris comme les néophytes.

Mais elle a également été mêlée à d’autres variétés depuis, comme l’animal Cookie ou encore la Fruit Pebbles OG.

Et l’équipe Kilogrammes est plutôt fière de vous présenter sa version de cette variété : la Fruitcake Popcorn CBD, une plante riche en cannabidiol, ayant un taux de THC inférieur à 0.3% !

De petites fleurs, mais un grand cru !

De dominance indica, la Fruitcake Popcorn CBD est de taille petite à moyenne, mais est, en revanche, très compacte. Elle offre alors un rendement plutôt grand, avec des petites têtes dures, ayant des nuances de vert et de marron clair, ornées de petits pistils orange à peine visibles. D’ailleurs, c’est pour la taille de ses buds que nous avons nommé cette variété “popcorn”.

Mais ces petites fleurs CBD ne manqueront pas de vous surprendre ! En effet, on pourrait croire que parce que les fleurs ont une taille relativement plus petite que la plupart des autres variétés, elles sont alors plus douces, voire totalement insignifiantes… Mais détrompez-vous ! Ces petits bourgeons recèlent de nombreux trichomes, qui contiennent des terpènes et des cannabinoïdes de qualité !

Cultivées en greenhouse, elles profitent alors de l’ensoleillement naturel, ainsi que de la richesse du sol, tout en évitant les parasites et autres variations naturelles, qui pourraient ralentir la croissance de la Fruitcake Popcorn CBD.

En effet, la Fruitcake Popcorn CBD est très appréciée pour ses arômes fruités et sucrés, rappelant souvent une variété bien connue, notre Gelato CBD. On y retrouve alors quelques notes d’agrumes qui viendront sublimer le tout !

Au niveau du goût, la Fruitcake Popcorn CBD offre des saveurs très fruités, combinés à une agréable douceur sucrée. Un subtil mélange d’acidité, de fruit et de sucre, voilà comment nous pourrions décrire les arômes de la Fruitcake Popcorn CBD.

La Fruitcake Popcorn CBD aurait des vertus apaisantes et relaxantes, qui pourraient vous aider à réduire certaines sensations de douleurs et d’inflammations chroniques.

Ayant un profil hybride, l’on ressent aussi bien le côté “coup de boost” de cette strain CBD que le côté apaisant. C’est une variété qui aide à poser votre esprit, et à apporter une détente physique au corps, sans pour autant vous fatiguer. Elle sera idéale en fin de journée, pour vous aider à oublier quelques tracas ou le midi, pour entamer la deuxième partie de la journée.

Bien entendu, les effets du CBD sont propres à chacun.e et ils peuvent varier d’une personne à une autre. Cependant, les produits CBD ne sont pas des médicaments et ne remplacent aucunement un traitement médical. Demandez conseil auprès de votre médecin en cas de besoin.

 

Vous avez plusieurs choix en termes de consommation de fleurs CBD, que ce soit par inhalation ou bien par ingestion. Si vous optez pour la première méthode, nous vous conseillons d’utiliser un vaporisateur, afin de profiter au mieux de notre Fruitcake Popcorn CBD sans en altérer le produit.

Mais vous pouvez également choisir la méthode par ingestion pour profiter de ces délicieuses fleurs CBD. Vous pouvez alors les utiliser comme ingrédients dans vos recettes, en créant du beurre CBD, de l’huile au CBD ou bien tout simplement en saupoudrant quelques fleurs décarboxylées dans votre assiette.

Et pour finir, vous pouvez en faire de délicieuses infusions de CBD, en plongeant vos fleurs dans un liquide chaud, toujours accompagné de lait entier ou d’une matière grasse. Ceci permettra au CBD de vous offrir son plein potentiel, et donc de profiter de ses bienfaits.

Vous pouvez également décider d’alterner les modes de consommation, en fonction de vos envies et de vos besoins. C’est à vous de juger la méthode qui vous convient le mieux !

name: Fruitcake
description:
A flower with a very flowery taste and sweet notes, that’s what this Fruitcake CBD promises you!

The best flower in America

Fruitcake is originally a hybrid strain, having been created from several strains, combining Animal Cookies and Fruity Pebbles OG in a new resin-rich, easy-to-grow variety.

Animal Cookies, an American bestseller, is a combination of Girl Scout Cookies and Fire OG. Fire OG is a remarkable variety, considered to be the strongest in the OG family. All it took was crossing an Animal Cookies with a Fruity Pebbles OG to create the super Fruitcake, a variety like no other!

Fruitcake combines the best of Animal Cookies and Fruity Pebbles OG in a high-yielding variety with large flowers covered in ultra-sticky resin.

That’s why the team is proud to present its CBD version on the shop: a plant rich in cannabidiol, with a THC level still below 0.3%.

 

Floral, fruity buds

The Fruitcake strain is originally an indica, which gives the plant the appearance of a stubby, sticky bush. But this only applies to THC-rich versions, and what the Kilogrammes team is offering you is the Fruitcake CBD version, which is rich in cannabidiol, so it won’t make any difference to the effects it can give you, just for information.

The light brown trichomes are responsible for the flavours of Fruitcake CBD, and are small to medium in size. But that doesn’t mean that the flavours of its buds are any less important – quite the contrary. In fact, one of the reasons Fruitcake is so popular with regular users and newcomers alike is its high yield.

The many trichomes in the flowers are filled with terpenes, the molecules that give the variety its organoleptic signature, as well as containing cannabinoids such as CBD and CBG.

 

Aromas to give you a boost

Need a little boost to give you the motivation to get through the day? Fruitcake CBD is the strain for you! Highly appreciated for its fruity, sweet flavours, it might remind you of other strains available in our shop, like our beloved Gelato CBD, for example. Just like her, Fruitcake has a few citrus notes that will make your day!

In terms of taste, you’ll enjoy its very fruity flavours, combined with a pleasant sweetness. Fruitcake could be defined as: subtly tart, fruity and sweet, a real treat in itself!

 

Relax with Fruitcake CBD

Fruitcake CBD is said to have soothing and relaxing properties, which are very useful in times of anxiety and/or stress. It is also said to be effective for chronic pain and inflammation, thanks to its anti-inflammatory properties.

It’s a strain that can help you put your mind at rest while offering physical relaxation without disconnecting you from reality. It’s a strain we’d tend to recommend at the end of the day, to relax you after a hard day, or at lunchtime, to give you the courage to get on with your day.

Of course, the effects of CBD are unique to each individual and may vary from one person to another. However, CBD products are not medicines and in no way replace medical treatment. Ask your doctor for advice if you need it.

 

How should Fruitcake CBD be used?

You can enjoy this fruity variety in any way you like, either by inhalation or ingestion. For the first method, we advise you to use a vaporiser, which will ensure risk-free consumption for your respiratory system, as the CBD flowers will not burn.

For the second method, you have various options, such as infusions, or preparing your CBD buds in butter after decarboxylating them. Or you can incorporate them into your favourite dishes, simply by sprinkling your decarboxylated flowers over your plate and enjoying a delicious, soothing moment.

Choose the one that suits you best, and don’t hesitate to try others 😉

KILOGRAMMES® GUARANTEES

  • Rigorously selected CBD flowers
  • THC levels below 0.3% (in accordance with current legislation)
  • For bulk purchases, go to the CBD wholesaler section

name: After Sun Elixir
description:
Take care of your skin after long exposure to the sun with Nanogram®After Sun Elixir .

Taking care of your skin

A cosmetic product that takes care of your skin, that’s what Nanogram® offers you with After Sun Elixir. This product is a blend of hemp oil, lemongrass and St John’s wort (Hypericum), plants known for their soothing properties. As its name suggests, After Sun Elixir can be applied after exposure to the sun, soothing and protecting your skin from irritation, redness and other discomforts that can occur after a day in the sun.

This after-sun oil with cannabis also helps to protect sensitive skin by moisturising and nourishing it.

Get nourished, repaired skin with After Sun Elixir!

A cannabis elixir

You’ve been enjoying the summer but unfortunately you’ve caught a sunburn (or several!), leaving you with irritated, tight skin…

Our After Sun Elixir is here to help you avoid this type of problem. With its 100% natural and vegan composition, your skin will thank you!

The natural formula of After Sun Elixir with cannabis is enriched with a combination of different oils, each with its own virtues.

  • Hemp oil soothes skin damaged by a multitude of internal and external factors;
  • Grapeseed oil is known to be one of the most widely used oils in cosmetics. Regenerating, it is widely used to combat wrinkles and cell ageing. It is used in our elixir to restore suppleness and elasticity to the skin;
  • St John’s Wort extract helps relieve itching and combat skin problems such as redness, eczema and psoriasis.
  • Marigold extract is known to treat skin inflammations such as burns;
  • Our After Sun Elixir contains lemongrass aroma for its soothing properties. As well as keeping away any potential mosquitoes, it leaves a very pleasant scent on your skin.

Our cannabis elixir has been designed with sensitive skin in mind, keeping it supple and soft.

 

The benefits of cannabis oil

The rich formula of After Sun Elixir will refresh and revitalise your sensitive skin after sun bathing and also help to maintain a natural tan. This formula has been created with natural ingredients that will soothe and protect even the most sensitive skin that has lost moisture.

What’s more, it also balances, nourishes and refreshes the skin in just a few days. Because this Nanogram® cannabis elixir contains an ideal ratio of omega fatty acids, it helps to support the skin’s cellular renewal and reinforce its self-protection role by accelerating the regenerative process.

The synergy of St John’s Wort and Calendula extracts calms and supports your skin’s regeneration process. As for lemongrass extract, it refreshes and delicately perfumes your skin, while offering natural protection against mosquitoes.

Be careful, though, as this elixir does not contain any UV protection, so remember to use sun cream if you’re going to be exposed to the sun.

After Sun Elixir is the essential oil for summer, as it is for all seasons!

 

Cannabis elixir certified by NATRUE

Natrue is an international association based in Brussels. It is committed to the promotion and protection of natural and organic cosmetics worldwide. Our after-sun cannabis oil has the NATRUE label, guaranteeing a controlled, healthy and natural product.

As there is currently no official regulatory definition for natural and organic cosmetics, the NATRUE label provides a reliable, verifiable and internationally applicable reference. Whether for beauty products, skincare products or any other cosmetic, NATRUE certifies the natural and organic authenticity of committed brands and manufacturers, such as Nanogram®.

Hemp After Sun Elixir is made from natural ingredients and is suitable for even the most sensitive skin.

A 100% vegan, Aromacert-certified product, guaranteed natural and healthy!

 

How do I use After Sun Elixir?

Like any other body oil, our After Sun Elixir is applied by massaging gently into clean skin. For a rapid effect, apply the elixir directly after getting out of the shower. This will ensure that your skin’s pores are open and ready to receive all the nourishing ingredients in After Sun Elixir.

However, we advise you not to expose your skin to the sun after applying the elixir, as it contains St John’s Wort, which is sensitive to light.

There’s no need to wait until you’ve got a sunburn to use Elixir oil, as it can be used as a daily treatment for dry skin. Its soft, silky texture will perfume your body, leaving no greasy film. The oil will be quickly absorbed by your skin, which will rebuild with suppleness and softness. We recommend storing After Sun Exilir in a dark, dry place, away from light and at room temperature.

This cannabis body oil is suitable for all skin types, so the whole family can enjoy it!

 

Full transparency

All the ingredients in Nanogram® products are chosen with care to ensure an impeccable composition with the best possible efficacy. Our cannabis oil is made with natural ingredients, guaranteed free from silicone and endocrine disruptors. After Sun Elixir is a healthy, vegan and natural product.

name: Therapeutic Skin Balm
description:
Get rid of your atopic skin with Nanogram®’s Therapeutic Skin Balm .

 

A balm for atopic skin

Have you tried every possible and unimaginable skin care product to try and soothe your sensitive skin, but with no real results? Try Therapeutic Skin Balm, made by Nanogram®, and say goodbye to your skin worries!

This cannabis balm tackles the most stubborn symptoms of atopic skin: red patches, lesions of all kinds, and more. Rich in hemp oil and CBD extract, it’s the ideal product for SKIN problemS.

Therapeutic Skin Balm will bring intense relief to red, flaky and painful skin.

Restore your skin’s radiance with Therapeutic Skin Balm!

 

Cannabis balm

Depending on the time of year, the cold, external aggressions and stress, your skin can become drier than usual. You may experience tightness, itching and increased dryness, especially if you have sensitive skin. It’s at these moments when intensive care is needed that Therapeutic Skin Balm can help relieve you of these discomforts.

This cannabis balm is made up of various ingredients that will support your skin, helping it to combat all the aggressions it faces on a daily basis. Therapeutic Skin Balm contains :

  • CBD extract , with its powerful anti-inflammatory and skin-soothing properties;
  • Hemp seed oil, rich in essential omega 3 and 6 fatty acids, vitamin E and minerals. Everything you need for healthy skin 🙂 ;
  • Calendula, shea butter and mango butter to soothe and nourish your skin.

This cannabis balm is an effective emergency remedy when acute care is needed! It provides intense relief for red, flaky and painful skin, such as atopic skin.

The CBD oil it contains is extracted using the low-temperature cold-pressing method. The result is a pure, solvent-free, alcohol-free product that is safe for all skin types. On the other hand, it contains no THC or water, so there’s no need to add preservatives or alcohol. As a result, the cannabis balm formula is well suited to the most sensitive skin types.

 

Cannabis balm and benefits

Cannabis Therapeutic Skin Balm provides deep skin care for cracked, flaky, red, swollen, itchy and irritated skin. This balm calms skin reactions and eczema flare-ups while reducing itching and areas of redness.

It is particularly effective for balancing oily, acne-prone and blemish-prone skin. Whether you have extremely sensitive skin, atopic skin or suffer from couperose or rosacea, this cannabis balm will soothe your skin.

But this cannabis balm multitasks, because it can also be used as a quick remedy for insect bites and cold sores. The ingredients in this cannabis balm are the purest in hemp and will deeply soothe, restore and relieve your skin.

It will become your ally for relief when the phase when your skin becomes increasingly red and swollen arrives. Once the skin’s condition has improved, this cannabis balm can continue its work if you make it part of your skincare routine.

 

Natrue certified cannabis balm

Natrue is an international association, based in Brussels, committed to the promotion and protection of natural and organic cosmetics worldwide. Our cannabis Therapeutic Skin Balm has the Natrue label, guaranteeing a controlled, healthy and natural product.

As there is currently no official regulatory definition for natural and organic cosmetics, the NATRUE label provides a reliable, verifiable and internationally applicable reference. Whether for beauty products, skincare products or any other type of cosmetic, Natrue certifies the natural and organic authenticity of committed brands and manufacturers, such as Nanogram®.

Certified Aromacert, our cannabis Therapeutic Skin Balm is made with natural ingredients that gently balance the skin, refine skin texture, give a healthy glow and fight imperfections.

A 100% vegan, Aromacert-certified product, guaranteed natural and healthy!

 

How do I use Therapeutic Skin Lotion?

Our cannabis balm has a very rich consistency, which may seem heavy on the skin, but it’s not! Its rich texture won’t leave a greasy film on your skin, letting it breathe while nourishing it.

Easy to apply, all you need is a small dab of this product to cover the largest areas of your skin. There’s no need to spread Therapeutic Skin Balm all over your face for its moisturising and nourishing properties to take effect.

Instead, you can apply it throughout the day, as often as necessary. It’s easily absorbed and leaves a pleasant sensation on the face, and can be used in tandem with the creams you use for your skin routine.

It’s best used after bathing to seal in the skin’s moisture, leaving your pores wide open to enjoy the benefits of cannabis balm. Developed with the purest ingredients possible, Therapeutic Skin Balm is suitable for people suffering from skin rashes or eczema.

 

Full transparency

All the ingredients in Nanogram® products are carefully selected to ensure that their composition is beyond reproach and as effective as possible. Our cannabis balm is therefore made with natural ingredients, guaranteed free from silicone and endocrine disruptors. Therapeutic Skin Balm is a healthy, vegan and natural product 🙂

INGREDIENTS: BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII BUTTER, MANGIFERA INDICA SEED BUTTER, CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER EXTRACT, OLEA EUROPAEA FRUIT OIL, CANNABIS SATIVA SEED OIL, CANNABIS SATIVA EXTRACT, BISABOLOL, TOCOPHEROL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS SEED OIL.

Independent dermatological study carried out by the J. S. Hamilton laboratory, the University of Modena and Second Opinion Medical Network.

NANOGRAM® GUARANTEES

  • Rigorously selected natural ingredients
  • 100% VEGAN
  • Not tested on animals

name: Strawsift CBG/CBD
description:
Discover a one of a kind products with delicious fruit flavours: The Strawsift!

 

What is Strawsift CBG ?

To understand the Strawsift CBG, you need to know its composition, which is the mix of Strawberry Lemonade and Drysift CBD !

You are certainly wondering what these different components are, and what are their properties? If you are not familiar with the world of cannabidiol, then it’s normal that terms like “drysift” seem strange to you. But the Kilogrammes team is here to guide you in choosing CBD products adapted to your needs!

 

Strawberry Lemon, a product rich in flavour

The Strawberry lemon is a variety of hemp, resulting from a cross between a Strawberry and a Lemon OG, giving plants that are easy to grow and resistant to cold, humidity and mold. With its Sativa dominance, Strawberry Lemon is a tall lady that can reach 2.50 meters if grown outdoors, but will remain around 1.50 meters if placed indoors.

With a flowering time of 60 to 70 days, it can produce up to 700 gr/m² of flowers, with a shiny appearance because it is rich in resin and terpenes. Its aroma combines notes of strawberry and lemon, with an earthly aftertaste, which appeals to consumers.

It has a stimulating effect due to its Sativa dominance, and helps promote creativity and physical relaxation, leaving its consumer in a positive state and relaxed.

 

Drysift CBD, what is it?

The other component of the Strawsift CBG is the drysift, which is another technique that allows certain parts of the CBD flower to be extracted. This process uses dry ice and sieves with larger or smaller mesh sizes, depending on the desired result. The goal of the technique is to recover trichomes, which are small resinous glands, real aroma bags! With this type of method we obtain a powerful product, high in cannabinoids !

There are different types of trichomes, divided into 3 classes:

  • Bulbous trichomes, which measure between 25 and 30 microns;
  • Sessile flower heads trichomes, also called “bulbous trichomes” measuring between 25 and 100 microns ;
  • Stemmed flower heads trichomes, also found under the name “glandular trichomes” and are the largest variety of trichomes! It is also this type of trichomes which contain the majority of cannabinoids and terpenes.

The mixture of the two elements allows us to obtain a product rich in CBD and CBG, for optimal relaxation!

 

A tasty and powerful product

CBD has been gaining popularity recently, and rightly so, as it helps relax the body, with muscle relaxation, and thus also reduces anxiety. The Kilogrammes team took the time to develop a product similar to Jelly Hash CBG, aiming to bring together taste, smell, texture, and the consistency of hash on a single canvas.

However, we ask you to be cautious, as this product is thermo-reactive and very sensitive to temperature fluctuations. This means that when temperatures are low, the Strawsift CBD adopts a hard texture and softens when it reaches room temperature.

A malleable, tasty, and high-quality product, that’s what describes Strawsift CBD well!

Everything you could expect from good hash, Strawsift has it!

 

 

How to enjoy Strawsift CBG ?

Since it’s a very sticky product, once you’ve heated it, do not touch it, or you’ll find it all over your fingers! It will then be very difficult to get rid of because this is not your classic hash. So be careful with your clothes and other fabrics, it would be a shame to waste the product 😉

Its storage will be optimal at a maximum of 15°C, so placing it in your fridge might be the best thing to do!

Adjust your consumption of Strawsift CBD according to your desires, needs, and consumption habits.

 

KILOGRAMMES® GUARANTEES

  • Rigorously selected CBD flowers
  • TCH levels of less than 0,3 % (in accordance to current legislation)
  • Premium quality terpenes
short_description:

This process yields a CBG Rosin, to which we add CBD Drysift collected using sieves and dry ice. This mixture provides a perfect ratio of CBG to CBD, for an optimal and especially unique effect!

name: Rosift CBG/CBD
description:
Discover the tasty mix of CBG Rosin and CBD drysift with this Rosift!

 

What is Rosin CBG?

If this term is unfamiliar to you, that’s normal, especially if you’re not a cannabis expert. Rosin is a product obtained by extracting from cannabis flowers. This product contains a specific category of cannabinoids, known as CBG or cannabigerol. To extract this precious molecule, a press is simply used to extract the active compounds.

At the end of the process, the result is an almost liquid product, resembling the texture of a spread, but very sticky, extremely sticky!

 

What is Drysift CBD?

Drysift refers to a particular extraction technique, which uses dry ice and sieves, also called micron bags to extract trichomes, which are small resinous glands contained in cannabis. With this type of method, we obtain a powerful product, high in cannabinoids!

There are different types of trichomes, divided into 3 classes:

  • Bulbous trichomes, which measure between 25 and 30 microns;
  • Sessile flower heads trichomes, also called “bulbous trichomes” measuring between 25 and 100 microns ;
  • Stemmed flower heads trichomes, also found under the name “glandular trichomes” and are the largest variety of trichomes! It is also this type of trichomes which contain the majority of cannabinoids and terpenes.

The mixture of the two elements allows us to obtain a product rich in CBD and CBG, for optimal relaxation!

 

A perfect blend of CBD and CBG

CBG products are gaining popularity in recent times. We took time to develop what looks like a  CBG Jelly Hash, in order to obtain a perfect combination of taste, smell, texture and hold of he hash. But be careful, the product is thermoreactive and sensitive to temperature variations. So when it is cold, it takes on a hard texture and softens when it is at room temperature.

You will therefore discover a tasty and superior quality product, with a very malleable and easily bubbling appearance.

In summary: everything you could expect from a good hash.

 

How to enjoy Rosift?

First tip: if you heat the rosift, don’t touch it afterwards, it’s very sticky! And hard to get rid of. Bear in mind that this is not a classical hash. Since the product is made with rosin, you can heat it then wipe it on a rolling paper for example.Otherwise we advise you to keep it cool and divide it into small pieaces when the product is completely cold.

As Rosift CBD is very reactive to heat, we advise you to store it in your refrigerator or at a temperature of 15°C maximum, in order to obtain optimal conservation.

You can opt to consume it in a culinary preparation, or by adding it to your hot drink to make an infusion. Don’t forget to add a fat so that CBD gains bioavailability.

It’s up to you to decide which method suits you best, based on your desires, your needs and your consumption habits.

 

KILOGRAMMES® GUARANTEES

  • Rigorously selected CBD flowers
  • TCH levels of less than 0,3 % (in accordance to current legislation)
  • Premium quality terpenes
short_description:
Rosift CBG-CBD by Kilogrammes: Our Rosift CBG-CBD is developed without solvents. CBG flowers are pressed at low temperature in order to preserve the cannabinoids, the harvested rosins is then mixed with harvested Drysift CBD using sieves and dry ice. The mixture of these two products provides access to a perfect CBG/CBD ratio, for an optimal and unique effect!

CBG: 29,7% CBD: 6,4% THC: <0.3%

name: Rosift CBG/CBD
description:
Découvrez le savoureux mélange de Rosin CBG et de drysift CBD avec ce Rosift !

 

 

 

Les produits CBG gagnent fortement en popularité ces derniers temps. Nous avons pris du temps pour élaborer ce qui ressemble à un Jelly Hash CBG, afin d’obtenir une parfaite combinaison entre le goût, l’odeur, la texture ainsi que la tenue du hash. Mais attention, ce produit est thermoréactif et sensible aux écarts de température. Ainsi lorsqu’il est froid, il adopte une texture dure et se ramollit lorsqu’il se trouvera à température ambiante.

Vous découvrirez de ce fait un produit savoureux et de qualité supérieure, avec un aspect très malléable et bullant facilement.

En résumé : tout ce que l’on peut attendre d’un bon hash.

 

Comment consommer ce Rosift ?

Premier conseil : si vous faîtes chauffer le rosift, ne le touchez pas ensuite, il sera très collant ! Et difficile de vous en débarrasser. Il ne faut pas oublier que ce n’est pas un hash classique. Étant donné que le produit est réalisé avec de la rosin, vous pourrez le chauffer puis l’essuyer sur une feuille par exemple. Sinon nous vous conseillons de le garder au frais et de le diviser en petits morceaux lorsque le produit est bien froid.

Comme le Rosift CBD est très réactif à la chaleur, nous vous conseillons de le conserver dans votre réfrigérateur ou à une température de 15 °C maximum, afin d’obtenir une conservation optimale.

Vous pouvez opter pour une consommation dans une préparation culinaire, ou bien en l’ajoutant dans votre boisson chaude pour en faire une infusion. N’oubliez pas d’ajouter un corps gras afin que le CBD gagne en biodisponibilité

C’est à vous de voir la méthode qui vous correspond le mieux, en fonction de vos envies, de vos besoins et de vos habitudes de consommation.

 

LES GARANTIES KILOGRAMMES®

  • Des fleurs CBD rigoureusement sélectionnées
  • Un taux de THC inférieur à 0,3 % (conformément à la législation en vigueur)
  • Des terpènes de première qualité

name: Green Crack
description:
Doyennes, doyens : réjouissez-vous.

Quant à vous, novices : préparez-vous à goûter un aperçu des anciens bails. Sans vouloir rentrer dans le fameux débat du “C’était mieux avant”, la Green Crack CBD dégage une odeur de weed bien old-school, le genre qu’on pouvait cop au début des années 2000, payées à prix d’or… si toutefois vous aviez les bons contacts. Le parfum qu’elle envoie est complexe : sucré sur le début, on y retrouve des notes fruitées et florales mais également résineuses ; un mélange qui rappelle l’orange amère confite. Excellent.

 

En provenance des US

La Green Crack dans sa version THC est la variété préférée de nombreux breeders en Californie, et elle poursuit sa carrière en Europe. La Green Crack est à l’origine une plante de cannabis aux origines assez anciennes, provenant d’une Skunk#1 et d’une Afghani, qui lui offre une génétique particulière.

Le résultat de ce mélange est une variété durable et forte, qui affiche une résistance impressionnante à certaines attaques, tels que les moisissures et les nuisibles. C’est une variété qui préfère les climats secs et chauds et, quand elle profite de bonnes conditions, apporte de magnifiques fleurs qui poussent en hauteur et qui regorgent de trichomes.

Avec sa forme de sapin de Noël, la Green Crack peut atteindre une grande taille, il est donc conseillé de la tailler ou de la palisser pour la faire pousser plus facilement. Ses bourgeons vert clair reflètent la douceur de cette variété. Et il en est de même pour notre Green Crack CBD.

Le saviez-vous ? La Green Crack existe depuis quelques dizaines d’années, mais elle n’a pas toujours porté ce nom. On la retrouve sous le nom de Crush ou de Green Crush par exemple.

Notre GROWER

Andreas

CBD 10,4
CBG 0,76
Δ9THC 0,30

Une sativa impressionnante

Les fleurs de la Green Crack THC ont des pistils qui tirent entre le rose et l’orange, qui laissent présager des effets puissants qu’elle peut offrir. Leur côté brillant prouve son abondance de résine, montrant sa richesse en terpènes. En tant que sativa, elle peut atteindre des tailles impressionnantes, bien que la Green Crack ne dépasse pas les 200 cm généralement.

C’est une plante qui, de par sa génétique généreuse, est assez souple sur sa culture, dans le sens où elle pardonnera facilement les légères fluctuations de nutriments, d’eau ou de lumière. C’est une plante idéale donc pour les cultivateurs débutants, qui auront le plaisir de voir au bout d’une soixantaine de jours de jolies petites fleurs résineuses.

Cultivée dans les bonnes conditions, ses cultivateurs pourront s’attendre à 450 à 500 g/m². Nous, on a décidé de la cultiver en indoor afin d’avoir le meilleur rendement possible.

La Green Crack, une douceur sans nom

Comme de nombreuses variétés, la Green Crack est un hybride qui possède, grâce à ce croisement des arômes inédits. Elle possède une odeur de fruits exotiques et a une saveur d’agrumes, de mangue, d’ananas, de cèdre et d’encens. Son effet est des plus agréables, que les consommateurs qualifient de cérébral, apportant un effet tonique, euphorique, puissant et de longue durée.

Comment consommer la Green Crack CBD ?

Les fleurs CBD peuvent se consommer de différentes façons, que vous pouvez alterner en fonction de vos envies, vos habitudes de consommation ou bien tout simplement de vos besoins.

Certains consommateurs vont les préférer en infusion, car le ressenti des effets se fera de manière plus douce, car plus lente. En effet, en ingestion, les effets du cannabidiol du fait de la digestion seront plus longs à se faire sentir, mais dureront plus longtemps dans le temps. On vous conseille de consommer de petites doses, d’attendre entre 1 heure et 1h30 avant de reprendre une dose, au besoin.

Mais vous pouvez également en faire du cannabeurre ou de l’huile au CBD, que vous intégrerez dans vos recettes, pour des moments gourmands et relaxants. Du fait de ses saveurs douces, la Green Crack CBD saura s’adapter à tous vos plats, qu’ils soient sucrés ou salés.

Pour finir, vous pouvez la consommer en inhalation, pour avoir des effets rapides. On vous conseille, si vous choisissez ce type de consommation, d’utiliser un vaporisateur, qui est un outil qui permet de profiter des vertus du CBD sans effets délétères. Car si vous brûlez vos fleurs, comme c’est le cas si vous les consommez roulées, la carbonisation dégage de la fumée qui peut être nocive pour votre système respiratoire.

  • Des fleurs CBD rigoureusement sélectionnées
  • Un taux de THC inférieur à 0,3 % (conformément à la législation en vigueur)
  • Pour des achats en gros, rendez-vous sur la section grossiste CBD
short_description:
GREEN CRACK : old-school et claquage garanti

 

La Green Crack n’est pas là pour faire dans la dentelle. Son odeur te replonge direct dans les années 2000 : un parfum sucré, résineux, ultra nostalgique. En bouche, c’est l’orange confite qui claque, sur un fond de résine brute. Les effets ? Rapides, puissants, presque assommants. À réserver aux habitués qui veulent un retour aux sources.

name: Mixing bowl
description:
Un Mixing bowl pour mélanger sa weed

Mélanger ses fleurs ou son hash avec son tabac ou un substitut, c’est toujours un exercice risqué ! En utilisant le creux de sa main pour procéder à ce mélange, il y a toujours un risque de perdre du matos au moment du transfert de la main à la feuille ou au vaporisateur, you know it.

C’est pourquoi l’équipe Kilogrammes vous propose un outil que tout bon stoner se doit d’avoir dans ses accessoires cannabis. Cet outil n’est autre que le mix bowl, une coupelle à la fois petite et robuste, qui permet de mélanger tabac et beuh et de transférer le tout dans une feuille, sans risque de perte.

Notre mixing bowl signé Kilogrammes facilitera grandement le remplissage de vos feuilles à rouler, vous permettant de profiter d’un moment décontractant de façon optimale.

Mixez avec style, avec les mixing bowls by Kilogrammes !

 

Mélangeur en silicone phosphorescent

Marre d’utiliser un vieux magazine, une noix de coco, le creux de votre main ou un coin de table pour faire votre mélange ? Facilitez-vous la vie avec les mixing bowls Kilogrammes !

Avec son petit diamètre de 7 centimètres, notre minxing bowl se glissera facilement dans votre sac ou tout simplement dans votre poche, et vous suivra partout ! Conçu dans un silicone de qualité, elle est facilement nettoyable, ce qui vous évitera de mélanger les différents arômes de vos fleurs CBD… sauf si c’est voulu !

Son petit plus, c’est qu’elle est phosphorescente, ce qui permet de la retrouver, même dans le noir. Ainsi, vous pourrez vous regarder un bon film, assis.e dans votre canapé, toutes lumières éteintes, et quand même pouvoir procéder à un mélange allemand. Cela facilite également le vidage de mixture dans les feuilles, même dans la pénombre.

Les mixing bowls sont disponible avec deux couleurs différentes, l’une étant de couleur rose fluo et l’autre rose pâle, vous aurez la surprise de découvrir la couleur de votre mixing bowl. En effet, les couleurs de ce produit ne sont pas sélectionnables dans les choix, et donc, cela vous laissera une surprise dans vous la recevrez !

Alliant souplesse et praticité, vous ne pourrez plus vous en passer ! 

 

Comment utiliser un Mixing Bowl ?

Le mixing bowl est un outil plutôt simple à prendre en main et à utiliser. Pour cela, il vous suffira de suivre ces simples étapes :

  • Sélectionner la ou les fleurs CBD que vous souhaitez consommer ;
  • Ajoutez le tabac (ou un substitut, c’est mieux) dans la coupelle ;
  • Mélangez délicatement avec vos doigts en repliant les bords du mixing bowl vers l’intérieur ;
  • Broyez et mixez les fleurs (et le tabac) en frottant les deux bords du bowl entre eux ;
  • Une fois que le mélange à un aspect presque homogène, vous pouvez verser le tout dans une feuille ou un vaporisateur ;
  • Il ne vous reste plus qu’à déguster votre roulage tranquillement.

Le principal avantage de ce bol est sa flexibilité naturelle qui vous permet de placer le mélange dans votre feuille en douceur et facilement, sans en perdre une miette !

 

LES GARANTIES KILOGRAMMES®

  • Une coupelle souple et solide
  • Un mélange homogène avec notre bowl
  • Une expérience unique
